description_long: This sculpture depicts a draped, headless human figure standing upright on a rectangular plinth. The figure is clothed in a classical-style garment with deep, flowing folds and a prominent diagonal sash across the chest. The left arm is bent and partially obscured by the drapery, while the right arm is missing. The back of the sculpture reveals more of the garment's vertical pleats and the curvature of the body beneath the fabric. The surface texture is matte and slightly rough, with visible chisel marks and weathering. The entire piece is rendered in a pale, stone-like material, suggesting durability and historical significance.
description: A headless, draped human figure in classical attire stands on a rectangular stone plinth, with detailed folds and a matte, weathered surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the draped garment, diagonal sash, and missing head and right arm.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the drapery and the figure's profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the vertical pleats of the garment and the curvature of the back.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizing the garment's folds and the missing right arm.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting is visible; the sculpture is isolated on a plain background.
